query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `offset_profiles` (
  `id` varchar(64) NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
  `userId` int NOT NULL,
  `ecuId` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `vehicleType` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `offsetDelta` int NOT NULL,
  `confidence` int NOT NULL,
  `tableSignaturesMatched` text NOT NULL,
  `notes` text,
  `createdAt` bigint NOT NULL,
  `updatedAt` bigint NOT NULL,
  KEY `idx_offset_user` (`userId`),
  KEY `idx_offset_ecu` (`ecuId`),
  KEY `idx_offset_vehicle` (`vehicleType`),
  KEY `idx_offset_user_ecu_vehicle` (`userId`, `ecuId`, `vehicleType`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `offset_correction_history` (
  `id` varchar(64) NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
  `userId` int NOT NULL,
  `ecuId` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `vehicleType` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `offsetDelta` int NOT NULL,
  `confidence` int NOT NULL,
  `status` enum('applied','failed','manual') NOT NULL,
  `notes` text,
  `appliedAt` bigint NOT NULL,
  KEY `idx_history_user` (`userId`),
  KEY `idx_history_ecu` (`ecuId`),
  KEY `idx_history_status` (`status`),
  KEY `idx_history_applied` (`appliedAt`)
);

  `ecuId` varchar(255) NOT NULL,

  `confidence` int NOT NULL,
  `tableSignaturesMatched` text NOT NULL,
  `notes` text,
  `createdAt` bigint NOT NULL,
  `updatedAt` bigint NOT NULL,
  KEY `idx_offset_user` (`userId`),
  KEY `idx_offset_ecu` (`ecuId`),
  KEY `idx_offset_vehicle` (`vehicleType`),
  KEY `idx_offset_user_ecu_vehicle` (`userId`, `ecuId`, `vehicleType`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `offset_correction_history` (
  `id` varchar(64) NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
  `userId` int NOT NULL,
  `ecuId` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `vehicleType` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `offsetDelta` int NOT NULL,
  `confidence` int NOT NULL,
  `status` enum('applied','failed','manual') NOT NULL,
  `notes` text,
  `appliedAt` bigint NOT NULL,
  KEY `idx_history_user` (`userId`),
  KEY `idx_history_ecu` (`ecuId`),
  KEY `idx_history_status` (`status`),
  KEY `idx_history_applied` (`appliedAt`)
);
